name: omarchy_backgrounds
content:
Backgrounds 
A the backgrounds for Omarchy ive in ~/.config/omarchy/[theme]/backgrounds. If you
want to add an extra background image to, say, the nord theme, you just put the fie in
~/.config/omarchy/nord/backgrounds.
You can do this most easiy by going to Insta > Stye > Background in the Omarchy
Menu. That' bring up the foder where the backgrounds for that theme is stored. Hit
Super + Shift + F to start another fie manager, find your background, copy it over. Now
it' be incuded in the cyce of backgrounds you can move between using Super + Ctrl +
Space.
You can find a huge coection of coo curated backgrounds on https://github.com/
dharmx/was.
Backgrounds · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/89/backgrounds
